reviews.review_description: It's a good improvement over the previous game, but I think it lacks enough features to make the dogs feel like an actual virtual pet. It would be great if you could need to wash the dogs, go for a walk with them, or take care of them in any other way besides just playing or leaning tricks. I hope that the game could improve over time with updates but also to have more publicity. The game realesed without me even noticing, which is very sad cause I am a fan of Neko Atsume. I hope the best for the development team and the game

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for taking the time to leave a review!
We’re delighted that you played Inu Atsume VR.
Your feedback will be carefully considered as we continue to improve the game.
Through ongoing updates, we will keep working to enhance features and gameplay, so we hope you look forward to what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description:
Update: Thanks for the response! We have a dedicated Quest Achievement Hunting Discord and website for tracking Quest Achievements progress (as well as the Horizon Mobile App) and will keep our fingers crossed to add Inu to the list. Great work on the game and we look forward to the updates!

Neko Atsume's Quest Achievements were fantastic. It's a shame we don't have them here. The game is enjoyable and interactions are done nicely. Also love the mixed reality option is fun!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for playing Inu Atsume VR, and also for enjoying Neko Atsume Purrfect!

Due to changes in OS specifications, the Achievement feature is not available in this title.
However, we have many updates planned for the future, so please look forward to them! 🐾

reviews.review_description: I was playing earlier today and the tutorial was actually very helpful but if you could buy collars that would be awesome! Other wise the game is fairly cute with the dogs and i haven't had any glitches so far so if your a dog lover and have a little money to spend on a game and you want dogs it's a perfect game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for taking the time to leave a review!
We’re delighted to hear that you’re enjoying the world of Inu Atsume VR.
Your feedback is greatly appreciated and will help us improve the game in the future.
We will continue to enhance features and gameplay through ongoing updates, so we hope you look forward to what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description: My kid ran to me crying because your game is broken he said when he gave the dog a toy 3 times and put his hand up to his mouth, and restarted left and rejoined and it never worked 1 star i would of rate it 0

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that you're having difficulty playing comfortably. We'll pass your feedback along to the development team.

If possible, could you let us know your device and OS version?
If the issue persists after updating the OS and restarting your device, please contact us at info-inuatsume@hit-point.co.jp with detailed information. We will assist you more directly.
